steps.title: Spot the affirmation
steps.content: The phrase “did just that” shows that Duchamp's sculpture actually accomplished what the first sentence says he intended—confirming the intention was correct. The transition must mark this as confirmation.

steps.title: Pick the confirming word
steps.content: ”Indeed” is the word for this—it introduces evidence that supports or proves a prior claim. Instead, In addition, and Similarly signal reversal, supplementary information, and likeness respectively. This matches choice D — D is correct.
